ksa_text: Report to board, audit committee, and executive leadership on data and AI risk posture, program maturity, regulatory compliance status, value realization, and strategic progress against roadmap commitments.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-T-011 (Leadership and Strategy/Task) scores 0.457 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.457) and is edge_case for the Metadata Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Metadata Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.457), and Leadership and Strategy handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis confirms Leadership and Strategy competencies at composite 0.457 are consistent with Metadata Manager hiring criteria.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for Metadata Manager. Final decision: include.
